summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MediFast Cameroon PWA healthcare booking app. Tested core features including welcome page, login, emergency page with real geolocation, symptom checker, doctors page with real pricing, and navigation elements.

ui_bugs.issue: RDV booking button redirects to RequireLogin page instead of booking page when user not logged in
ui_bugs.note: This is actually correct behavior for protected routes, but could show better UX messaging

missing_features.issue: Theme toggle button not clearly identifiable in header
missing_features.note: Header has 4 buttons but theme toggle not clearly marked with data-testid

navigation_issues.issue: Bottom navigation not consistently visible on all pages
navigation_issues.note: Navigation works on home page but missing on other pages

passed_tests: Welcome page loads with login/register button
Login page renders with email and password fields
Emergency page shows hospitals sorted by REAL distance from user location
Emergency page hospital list shows distance in km and time in minutes
Emergency page 'Départements' button opens modal with departments
Emergency page 'Y aller' navigation button present (Google Maps integration)
Symptom checker accepts text input and shows analysis
Symptom checker shows recommended departments after analysis
Symptom checker shows nearby hospitals with matching departments
Doctors page shows real prices (7,000 FCFA for specialists, 15,000 FCFA for professors)
Real geolocation and Haversine distance calculation working

medium_priority: Add data-testid to theme toggle button for better testability
Ensure bottom navigation is consistently visible across all pages
Consider adding better UX messaging when booking requires login
low_priority: Add visual indicators for theme toggle button
